steps.title: Keep the compound names essential
steps.content: Quindoxin and isobutylene identify which gaseous compounds have the listed molar masses. Because the names are essential, they should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary commas
steps.content: Choice A treats the compound names as nonessential, Choice B adds a trailing comma before the verb, and Choice C opens an appositive without closing it. The remaining choice uses no commas around the essential names. The answer is D.
